name: MAC Viper AirFX
comment:
Viper Air FX:
- 35000 Lumens 
- 1:5 zoom - Continuous and fast zoom with auto-linked focus
- 160 mm precision PC front lens for fat beam looks
- The Martin Quadray Module is available as an accessory for the MAC Viper AirFX. It splits the MAC Viper AirFX beam into four individually controllable rays.

capabilities.comment: Lamp switches to 800 watt mode after shutter is closed for 10 seconds

capabilities.comment: Reset color (CMY, CTO and color wheel) only
Reset beam (aerial effect gobos, static gobos, iris, wash effect, zoom, focus) only
Linear dimming curve (menu override, setting unaffected by power off/on)
Square law dimming curve (menu override, factory default setting, setting unaffected by power off/on)
Inverse square law dimming curve (menu override, setting unaffected by power off/on)
S-curve dimming curv (menu override, setting unaffected by power off/on)
Normal pan and tilt speed (menu override - setting returns to MENU setting after power on/off)
Fast pan and tilt speed (default setting, menu override - setting returns to MENU setting after power on/off)
Slow pan and tilt speed (menu override - setting returns to MENU setting after power on/off)
Effect shortcuts = ON (default setting, menu override, setting stays at factory default ON at power off/on)
Effect shortcuts = OFF (menu override, setting returns to factory default ON at power off/on)
Enable zoom/focus linking, medium distance (default setting)
Ballast output full, set to 100% (default setting)
Store all CMY and CTC calibration
Store aerial effect gobo wheel (wheel 1) slot index calibration
Reset all calibration values to factory defaults
Reset All Calibration To Factory Default (5s)
